head.hi: The Department of State to the German Embassy

div.p: The Secretary of State refers to the Embassy’s Aide-Mémoire, dated April 16, 1931, (St. Dep. A 16) concerning the admission of German student laborers into the United States and to the desire of twentynine students, who have already been admitted to this country, to remain for a further period.

Confirming the information given to Doctor LeitnerRudolf Leitner, First Secretary of the German Embassy. by a member of the Department over the telephone recently, it may be stated that the cases of the twenty-nine students referred to are being reviewed by the appropriate branch of the Government. When information shall have been received regarding the decision reached in the cases of the students mentioned, the Embassy will be further advised.
